vocab.meaning: siêu ứng dụng (tích hợp nhiều dịch vụ như gọi xe, giao thức ăn, thanh toán)
vocab.example: Super-apps have become the cornerstone of our digital economy, blending social networking with instant logistics.

vocab.meaning: cổng thông tin/ứng dụng đặt xe
vocab.example: Ride-hailing portals are immensely popular in urban centers, offering a level of convenience that traditional taxis can't match.
There is a massive craze for short-form video outlets among Gen Z, where viral challenges are born every day.
Local classified advertisement sites remain a staple for people looking to buy second-hand goods or find housing.

vocab.meaning: trang mạng xã hội hướng nghiệp (như LinkedIn)
vocab.example: Career-led networking sites are gaining traction as young professionals look to build their personal brands.

vocab.meaning: trung tâm trò chơi trực tuyến nhiều người chơi
vocab.example: The country has a robust gaming culture, so massively multiplayer online hubs often see peak traffic during late hours.

vocab.meaning: trang web cho vay ngang hàng
vocab.example: Peer-to-peer lending sites are disrupting traditional finance by offering alternative credit options to small businesses.

vocab.meaning: công cụ/trang web đặt phòng và vé du lịch
vocab.example: Domestic travel booking engines have seen a resurgence as locals seek to explore hidden gems within the country.

vocab.meaning: blog đời sống dựa trên phí đăng ký (trả phí để xem nội dung)
vocab.example: We are seeing a rise in subscription-based lifestyle blogs where influencers share exclusive wellness and fashion tips.

vocab.meaning: trang web tổng hợp thông tin bất động sản
vocab.example: For those looking to invest, real estate clearinghouses provide a comprehensive look at market trends and property valuations.
